kata — keybindings

Global                        List                       Detail                                 
?         help                k/up    up                 tab            next tab                
q/ctrl+c  quit                j/down  down               shift+tab      prev tab                
R         scope toggle (gated)pgup    page up            enter          jump to referenced issue
                              pgdown  page down          esc/backspace  back                    
                              g       first              e              edit body               
                              G       last               c              new comment             
                              enter   open detail        p              set parent              
                              space   expand/collapse    b              add blocker             
                              n       new issue (form)   L              add link                
                              N       new child          +              add label               
                              /       search             -              remove label            
                              s       cycle status filtera              assign owner            
                              f       filter (form)      A              clear owner             
                              c       clear filters                                             
                              x       close                                                     
                              r       reopen                                                    

press ? to return
